entityName: My Teen Romantic Comedy SNAFU Too!

metadata.entityName: My Teen Romantic Comedy SNAFU Too!

ingredients.name: Shoun Seiryu
ingredients.address: 311 Kiyomizu, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto, 605-0862, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: During the Kyoto school trip in episode 1, Hachiman spots this striking blue dragon sculpture near Kiyomizudera, a quiet moment as he wanders apart from his classmates before the service club dynamics start unraveling.

ingredients.name: Tokyo Sea Life Park Penguin Area
ingredients.localName: 葛西臨海水族園 ペンギンエリア
ingredients.address: 6 Chome-2-3 Rinkaicho, Edogawa City, Tokyo 134-8587, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The penguin enclosure at Kasai Rinkai Aquarium features in episode 13 during the casual group outing, where Hachiman, Yukino, and Yui enjoy a rare moment of uncomplicated togetherness after the culture festival's emotional fallout.

ingredients.name: Waku Waku Hiroba Keisei Chiba Chuo
ingredients.localName: わくわく広場 京成千葉中央店
ingredients.address: 15-１５番１号 Honchibacho, Chuo Ward, Chiba, 260-0014, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Waku Waku Hiroba market near Keisei Chiba-Chuo Station appears in episode 3, a local supermarket-style shop in central Chiba that the characters visit during one of their preparatory errands.

ingredients.name: Wendy’s First Kitchen - Inage Station
ingredients.localName: ウェンディーズ・ファーストキッチン 稲毛駅前店
ingredients.type: ファースト フード店
categories: ファースト フード店
ingredients.address: １Ｆ, 2 Chome-3-8 Konakadai, Inage Ward, Chiba, 263-0043, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Wendy’s First Kitchen at Inage Station appears in episode 7, a fast-food stop in the characters’ Chiba neighborhood used as a casual meeting or hangout backdrop.

ingredients.name: Yosiya - Main Street shop
ingredients.address: Sagatenryuji Susukinobabacho, Ukyo Ward, Kyoto, 616-8385, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This traditional Arashiyama shop in Sagano appears during the Kyoto school trip sequence in episode 2, one of the charming storefronts the characters pass as they wander the main street near Togetsukyo.

ingredients.name: ZOZO Marine Stadium
ingredients.address: 1 Mihama, Mihama Ward, Chiba, 261-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: ZOZO Marine Stadium (then QVC Marine Field) appears in episode 11 during the group date circuit scene, the landmark Chiba ballpark serving as backdrop for the outing that culminates in Hachiman's raw, painful declaration that he wants something genuine.

ingredients.name: Brewery Dining KOKORO
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒260-0013 Chiba, Chuo Ward, Central, 3 Chome−4−17 Gaビル
ingredients.entityContext: Brewery Dining KOKORO in central Chiba appears in episode 4, one of the dining and bar establishments in the Chiba nightlife district that provides a backdrop for adult-adjacent character scenes.

ingredients.name: Arashiyama Bamboo Forest
ingredients.address: Sagaogurayama Tabuchiyamacho, Ukyo Ward, Kyoto, 616-8394
ingredients.entityContext: In episode 2 of the Kyoto arc, the bamboo grove at Arashiyama is the backdrop for a quiet, atmospheric scene as the service club members drift through the iconic tunnel of stalks, one of the most visually memorable settings of the school trip.

ingredients.name: Inagekaigan Station Bus
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒261-0004 Chiba, Mihama Ward, Takasu, 3-chōme−24
ingredients.entityContext: The bus stop at Inagekaigan Station appears in episode 8, part of the Mihama Ward transit network the characters use when traveling between Inage and the bayside areas of Chiba.

ingredients.name: Inage Sengen Shrine
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-15-10 Inage, Inage Ward, Chiba, 263-0034, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Inage Sengen Shrine appears in episode 10 as a setting tied to the preparation for the cultural festival and the interpersonal negotiations within the service club, its wooded staircase approach providing a contemplative backdrop.

ingredients.name: Hotel Okura Kyoto Okazaki Bettei
ingredients.localName: ホテルオークラ京都 岡崎別邸
ingredients.address: 26-6 Okazaki Tennocho, Sakyo Ward, Kyoto, 606-8335, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This Okazaki hotel stands in for the accommodation used by the students during the Kyoto school trip in episode 1, the refined Kyoto setting lending an air of formality to the scenes set there.

ingredients.name: Hotel Monselaton
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-5-1 Shinjuku, Chuo Ward, Chiba, 260-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Hotel Monselaton in central Chiba appears in the OVA as part of the Chiba city-center streetscape, a modest hotel building recognizable to fans doing pilgrimage walks through the downtown area.

ingredients.name: Hotel Heian No Mori Kyoto
ingredients.address: 51 Okazaki Higashitennocho, Sakyo Ward, Kyoto, 606-8332, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Hotel Heian no Mori in the Okazaki district is another of the Kyoto hotels featured in episode 1 during the school trip accommodation scenes.

ingredients.name: HUB Chibafujimiten
ingredients.address: ラフィネビル Ｂ１Ｆ, 2 Chome-4-9 Fujimi, Chuo Ward, Chiba, 260-0015, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The HUB British pub in the Fujimi district of Chiba appears in episode 11, one of the Chiba city center venues glimpsed around the time of the group date circuit preparations.

ingredients.name: Fushimi Inari Yotsuji
ingredients.address: 15 Inariyamakanyuchi, Fushimi Ward, Kyoto, 612-0804, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Yotsuji crossroads partway up Fushimi Inari features in episode 2 during the Kyoto trip, its sweeping view over Kyoto providing a rare moment of stillness before the emotional tensions of the season escalate.

ingredients.name: Enmusubinokami
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-317 Kiyomizu, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto, 605-0862, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This small love-and-marriage shrine near Kiyomizudera is visited during the Kyoto school trip in episode 1, adding ironic weight given how far Hachiman is from understanding what he actually wants from his relationships.

ingredients.name: Diamond and Flower Ferris Wheel
ingredients.localName: ダイヤと花の大観覧車
ingredients.address: 6 Chome-2-2 Rinkaicho, Edogawa City, Tokyo 134-0086, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The large Ferris wheel at Kasai Rinkai Park appears in episode 13, its slow rotation providing a reflective backdrop as the trio winds down from the emotional strain of the preceding arcs.

ingredients.name: Chibashi Takasu Community Center
ingredients.localName: 千葉市 高洲コミュニティセンター
ingredients.type: コミュニティ センター
categories: コミュニティ センター
ingredients.address: 千葉市美浜区高洲コミュニティセンター, 3 Chome-12-1 Takasu, Mihama Ward, Chiba, 261-0004, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Takasu Community Center in Mihama Ward appears in episode 6 as a public venue used for a service club-related activity or meeting, its modest municipal exterior typical of the everyday Chiba settings the series favors.

ingredients.name: Chiba Station
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒260-0031, 千葉県千葉市中央区新千葉１丁目１
ingredients.entityContext: Chiba Station functions as the central transit hub for the series, appearing in episode 4 and throughout as the characters commute between school, service club activities, and the various locations around Chiba city.

ingredients.name: Isohama Bridge
ingredients.description: Isohama Bridge (磯浜大橋) — local bridge in Takahama, Chiba, near 磯の松原 and 'Beach Scene' Statue. Not listed on Google Maps, but the coordinates fall in this area — a verified scene location. Navigate by coordinates / Street View.
ingredients.entityContext: Isohama Bridge in the Takahama area of Chiba is a documented scene location for episode 11, one of the coastal landmarks that anchor the group date circuit at the heart of the season's most emotionally charged sequence.

ingredients.name: Isomaru Suisan Chiba Chuo Ekimae Store
ingredients.localName: 磯丸水産 千葉中央駅前店
ingredients.address: 2F, 4-15 1 Honchibacho, Chuo Ward, Chiba, 260-0014, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This izakaya-style seafood chain near Chiba-Chuo Station appears in episode 3 as a background restaurant in the Chiba downtown area visited during the culture festival planning arc.

ingredients.name: Izakaya restaurant
ingredients.address: 第３プレシードビル, 2 Chome-2-1 Shinjuku, Chuo Ward, Chiba, 260-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The izakaya Hirokichi in central Chiba appears in the OVA, a local drinking establishment in the Chiba nightlife quarter used as a backdrop for an adult-facing scene.

ingredients.name: KFC Inage Marinpia Branch
ingredients.localName: ケンタッキーフライドチキン稲毛マリンピア店
ingredients.type: ファースト フード店
categories: ファースト フード店
ingredients.address: マリンピア 1階, 3 Chome-13-1 Takasu, Mihama Ward, Chiba, 261-0004, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The KFC inside Aeon Marinpia shopping center appears in episode 7, part of the Inage coastal commercial district that the characters frequent during the Chiba-based episodes.

ingredients.name: Kasai Rinkai Park
ingredients.address: 6 Chome-2-2 Rinkaicho, Edogawa City, Tokyo 134-0086, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Kasai Rinkai Park in Tokyo is the setting for the final episode 13 outing, where the service club members and some classmates visit the seaside park and aquarium in a bittersweet moment of normalcy before the season ends.

ingredients.name: Kasai-Rinkai Park Station
ingredients.address: 6-chōme-3 Rinkaichō, Edogawa City, Tokyo 134-0086, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Kasai-Rinkai Park Station is the arrival point in episode 13 for the group outing to the park and aquarium, the JR Keiyo Line platform recognizable to fans who retrace the episode 13 route.

ingredients.name: Keisei-Inage Station
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒263-0034, 千葉県千葉市稲毛区稲毛３丁目１−１７
ingredients.entityContext: Keisei-Inage Station appears in episode 10 as characters travel around Chiba during the cultural festival arc, the small private-railway station reflecting the everyday suburban texture of Hachiman's world.

ingredients.name: Keisei-Makuhari Station
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒262-0032, 千葉県千葉市花見川区幕張町４丁目６０１
ingredients.entityContext: Keisei-Makuhari Station is a transit point in episode 10, part of the Chiba suburban rail network the characters use to move between locations during the pre-festival planning episodes.

ingredients.name: Kiyomizu-Dera Otowanotaki Falls
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-294 Kiyomizu, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto, 605-0862, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The famous Otowa waterfall at Kiyomizudera appears in episode 1 during the school trip, where students line up to drink from the three streams, each granting a different wish, a setting charged with longing given Hachiman and Yukino's unspoken feelings.

ingredients.name: Kiyomizu-dera Niomon Gate
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-294 Kiyomizu, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto, 605-0862, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Niomon gate of Kiyomizudera is shown as the service club members make their way through the temple complex during the Kyoto school trip in episode 1, framing the iconic approach to the main hall.

ingredients.name: Kiyomizudera Zuigudo
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-294 Kiyomizu, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto, 605-0862, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Zuigudo hall at Kiyomizudera appears during the episode 1 Kyoto school trip sequence, its womb-stone passage symbolically echoing the theme of rebirth and self-examination that defines Hachiman's arc in season 2.

ingredients.name: Kyoto Okazaki Post Office
ingredients.address: 16 Okazaki Tennocho, Sakyo Ward, Kyoto, 606-8335, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Kyoto Okazaki Post Office appears as a background landmark in episode 1 during the school trip, part of the Okazaki district streetscape near the hotels used by the class.

ingredients.name: Kyoto Station
ingredients.address: Higashishiokoji Kamadonocho, Shimogyo Ward, Kyoto, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Kyoto Station serves as the arrival and departure hub for the school trip in episodes 1 and 2, the imposing modern structure marking the boundary between the characters' everyday Chiba lives and the emotionally charged Kyoto interlude.

ingredients.name: Kyoto Station Daikaidan (Great Staircase)
ingredients.localName: 京都駅ビル 大階段
ingredients.address: 901 Higashishiokojicho, Shimogyo Ward, Kyoto, 600-8216, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The dramatic Great Staircase inside Kyoto Station building is glimpsed in episode 1 as the class arrives, its sweeping scale underlining the sense of occasion that the Kyoto trip carries for the characters.

ingredients.name: Maihama Station
ingredients.address: 26-5 Maihama, Urayasu, Chiba 279-0031, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Maihama Station, the JR gateway to Tokyo Disneyland, is shown in episode 9 as the class arrives for their theme park outing, the crowded platform capturing the giddy anticipation that contrasts with Hachiman's habitual detachment.

ingredients.name: Makuhari Seaside Park
ingredients.localName: 千葉県立幕張海浜公園
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-116 Hibino, Mihama Ward, Chiba, 261-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Makuhari Seaside Park appears in the opening sequence, its sweeping coastal lawns and sea views establishing the Chiba bayside setting that defines the geography of the series.

ingredients.name: Matsuya Inage
ingredients.address: 第８若菜ビル, 2 Chome-5-15 Konakadai, Inage Ward, Chiba, 263-0043, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Matsuya gyudon restaurant near Inage Station appears in episode 7, the budget beef-bowl chain perfectly suited to Hachiman's no-frills eating habits and the series' unglamorous portrayal of ordinary student life.

ingredients.name: Megumi Kindergarten
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-7-9 Koyata, Iruma, Saitama 358-0026, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: A kindergarten building in the Takahama area appears in episode 11 during the group date circuit episode, the ordinary suburban neighborhood streetscape forming part of the route.

ingredients.name: Messe Bridge
ingredients.address: Nakase, Mihama Ward, Chiba, 261-0023, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Messe Bridge near the Makuhari waterfront appears in episode 11 during the group date circuit, the wide coastal bridge one of several Chiba landmark crossings woven into that episode's emotional geography.

ingredients.name: Mihama Bridge
ingredients.address: Mihama Ward, Chiba, 261-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Mihama Bridge over the Chiba canal is seen in episode 8 as characters travel through the Mihama district, a quiet transit shot that grounds the series in the real streets of Chiba.

ingredients.name: Miyashige Inari Shrine
ingredients.address: 51 Okazaki Higashitennocho, Sakyo Ward, Kyoto, 606-8332, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This small inari shrine near the Okazaki hotel cluster appears in episode 1 as background scenery during the Kyoto school trip, adding to the authentic Kyoto neighborhood atmosphere of the accommodation area.

ingredients.name: Musashiya Fujimi Store
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒260-0015 Chiba, Chuo Ward, Fujimi, 2 Chome−14−6
ingredients.entityContext: Musashiya ramen shop in the Fujimi district of Chiba appears in the OVA, one of the local ramen joints that suits Hachiman's preference for unpretentious, filling food.

ingredients.name: Nakatakahama Park
ingredients.address: 4 Chome-6 Takahama, Mihama Ward, Chiba, 261-0003, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Nakatakahama Park in the Takahama bayside area appears in episode 4, one of the small coastal parks along the Chiba waterfront that the series uses to capture the quiet residential character of Mihama Ward.

ingredients.name: Ozora Plaza (Kyoto Station Building)
ingredients.address: 901 Higashishiokojicho, Shimogyo Ward, Kyoto, 600-8216, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The rooftop Ozora Plaza of Kyoto Station appears in episode 2 as the service club and classmates make their way back after the Arashiyama excursion, the grand modern station building contrasting with the ancient city they just left.

ingredients.name: Peasy N Parking Lot
ingredients.address: 5 Chome-29 Minamikarasuyama, Setagaya City, Tokyo 157-0062, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: A parking area near central Chiba appears in episode 4 as incidental background scenery during one of the service club's in-city errands.

ingredients.name: Pizza Hut Mihama Takasu

ingredients.address: 稲毛海岸駅前プラザ６号棟 １Ｆ, 3 Chome-5-6 Takasu, Mihama Ward, Chiba, 261-0004, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Pizza Hut near Inagekaigan Station appears in episode 7, a familiar chain-restaurant streetscape near the station that grounds the scene in the everyday commercial environment of Chiba's Mihama Ward.

ingredients.name: Plaza Terrace
ingredients.address: Shimbashi Plaza Bldg., ３階, 4 Chome-9-1 Shinbashi, Minato City, Tokyo 105-0004, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Plaza Terrace near Maihama appears in episode 9 during the Disneyland-area outing, a dining or gathering spot that features in the character interactions surrounding the class trip.

ingredients.name: REGENT KYOTO
ingredients.address: 30 Okazaki Higashitennocho, Sakyo Ward, Kyoto, 606-8332, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Regent Kyoto (formerly Ana Crown) in the Okazaki area appears in episode 1 as part of the school-trip hotel district scenes, its location near Heian Shrine grounding the trip in upmarket central Kyoto.

ingredients.name: Rinko Park
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-1-1 Minatomirai, Nishi Ward, Yokohama, Kanagawa 220-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Rinko Park in Yokohama's Minato Mirai appears in the opening credits sequence, its distinctive waterfront geometry and cityscape providing one of the animated skylines associated with the show's visual identity.

ingredients.name: Ryoan-ji
ingredients.address: 13 Ryoanji Goryonoshitacho, Ukyo Ward, Kyoto, 616-8001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Ryoan-ji's famous rock garden appears during the Kyoto school trip in episode 2, its spare, contemplative aesthetic mirroring the reserved introspection that Hachiman and Yukino both project throughout the trip.

ingredients.name: Saizeriya Inage Kaigan Ekimae
ingredients.localName: サイゼリヤ 稲毛海岸駅前店

ingredients.entityContext: The Saizeriya family restaurant near Inagekaigan Station appears in episode 5, a budget chain restaurant that fits perfectly with the series' grounded depiction of suburban high-school life in Chiba.

ingredients.name: Shinsen Gumi Shop
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒616-8162 Kyoto, Ukyo Ward, Uzumasa Higashihachiokacho, 10 ロケーションスタジオ, 東映太秦映画村 アトラクション広場
ingredients.entityContext: This souvenir shop at Toei Kyoto Studio Park is shown in episode 2 during the class's free time at the film studio attraction, adding color to the Kyoto trip montage.

ingredients.address: 東京ディズニーランド, １-1 Maihama, Urayasu, Chiba 279-0031, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Splash Mountain at Tokyo Disneyland is among the rides featured in episode 9 during the class Disneyland outing, its log-flume climax a vivid shared experience for a group that rarely allows itself to be openly carefree.

ingredients.name: Starbucks Coffee - Chiba-chuo Station

ingredients.name: Starbucks Coffee - Yodobashi Chiba

ingredients.name: Takahama Post Office (bus)
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒261-0003 Chiba, Mihama Ward, Takahama, 4-chōme−10
ingredients.entityContext: The bus stop near the Takahama Post Office appears in episode 11 as part of the Chiba bayside route traveled during the group date circuit, a recognizable local landmark along the coastal neighborhood.

ingredients.name: Tenkaippin - Main Shop (Sohonten)
ingredients.address: メゾン白川 1F, 94 Ichijoji Tsukidacho, Sakyo Ward, Kyoto, 606-8175, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Hachiman visits the original Tenkaippin ramen shop in episode 1 of the Kyoto school trip, a nod to his enthusiasm for thick kotteri ramen that fans of the source material will recognize as an in-character pilgrimage stop.

ingredients.name: The most terrifying Haunted House
ingredients.localName: 史上最恐のお化け屋敷
ingredients.address: 18-23 Uzumasa Hachiokacho, Ukyo Ward, Kyoto, 616-8162, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The haunted house attraction at Toei Kyoto Studio Park appears in episode 2, a lighthearted moment during the school trip that briefly breaks the tension among the characters before deeper conflicts emerge.

ingredients.name: Toei Kyoto Studio Park
ingredients.address: 10 Uzumasa Higashihachiokacho, Ukyo Ward, Kyoto, 616-8586, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The group visits Toei Kyoto Studio Park in episode 2, the Edo-period film sets providing a playful backdrop for class bonding while the service club members maintain their characteristic emotional distance from each other.

ingredients.name: Togetsukyo Bridge
ingredients.address: 1-5 Sagatenryuji Susukinobabacho, Ukyo Ward, Kyoto, 616-8384, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Togetsukyo Bridge over the Oi River in Arashiyama appears in episode 2 of the Kyoto school trip, with the group crossing it as part of their free-time exploration of the Arashiyama district.

ingredients.name: Tokyo Disneyland
ingredients.localName: 東京ディズニーランド
ingredients.address: 1-1 Maihama, Urayasu, Chiba 279-0031, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Tokyo Disneyland is the setting for the group outing in episode 9, a class event that puts Hachiman and his friends in a situation demanding sociability and forces quiet but significant character interactions among the service club trio.
